mapper.select: SELECT su.user_id repair_man_id, su.nick_name repair_man_name FROM `sys_user_role` sur JOIN sys_user su ON sur.user_id = su.user_id AND su.del_flag = '0' ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT u.user_id, u.email, u.nick_name AS username, u.id_num, u.phonenumber, u.address, r.room_name, r.room_id FROM sys_user as u LEFT JOIN room r ON u.user_id = r.user_id AND u.del_flag = '0' ${ew.customSqlSegment}
